basic_details.job_title: NERAMAC Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Regional Agricultural Marketing Corporation (NERAMAC)
basic_details.short_information: The North Eastern Regional Agricultural Marketing Corporation (NERAMAC) has officially announced the Project Officer Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been released under Advertisement No. P&A/48/I-V/Part-III/ on the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 35 years and hold qualifications such as B.Sc./M.Sc. in Agriculture, Bachelor of Engineering, or MBA can submit their offline applications on or before 31 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application details are shared below.

qualification.details: B.Sc/M.Sc in Agriculture/Bachelor of Engineering/MBA from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates possessing qualifications in other related disciplines may also be considered.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.neramac.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NERAMAC Project Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download NERAMAC Project Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NERAMAC Project Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NERAMAC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NERAMAC Project Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NERAMAC Project Officer Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: B.Sc/M.Sc in Agriculture/Bachelor of Engineering/MBA from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates possessing qualifications in other related disciplines may also be considered.

content_sections.heading: NERAMAC Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.neramac.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NERAMAC Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NERAMAC Project Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the NERAMAC Project Officer position is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Officer post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is B.Sc/M.Sc in Agriculture, Bachelor of Engineering, or MBA from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates with qualifications in related disciplines may also be considered.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Officer post is 35 years. There is no mention of age relaxation for reserved categories in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Officer position will receive a salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NERAMAC Project Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NERAMAC Project Officer recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Officer post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the Project Officer post in the North Eastern Regional Agricultural Marketing Corporation (NERAMAC).

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the NERAMAC Project Officer recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Officer post involves an Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NERAMAC located?
faq.answer: NERAMAC is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781019.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Officer position is contractual.
